arts.sum: Frank Lampard has provided an injury update on Coventry City’s leading scorer Haji Wright whose return to action is taking a “bit longer” than had been hoped. I haven’t seen him yet and just see him in the gym and have a little chat with him here and there, so it’s really unfortunate because I know the level of player that he is and what he can do for this club.
